
### random numbers  {.smaller}


* want keys, etc. to be unguessable and evenly distributed 
<hr class="vspace" />
* solution: random numbers
* but: many random number functions are not cryptographically secure! 

   * example NOT SECURE: ~~C <code>rand()</code>; Python's <code>random.random</code>~~
   * better: Python's <code>secrets</code>, <code>os.urandom</code>; Linux <code>getrandom()</code>, <code>/dev/urandom</code>
 
<hr class="vspace" />
* extra effort to ensure <em>not guessable</em>
* need to incorporate ‘‘entropy’’ from unpredictable sources 

   * deliberately unstable circuit; exact timing of input/output; etc.
